text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Hm? There's no one around... I could've sworn I
heard someone calling me just now, though...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Oh, maybe it was the Three Goddesses that
called me! There are lots of folk songs that sing
about that kinda stuff.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Hellooo! Is there something you needed me for?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: If there's anything I can help with, feel free to ask!
